Oct 1, 2012 CONTENTS UCB access to Box.net Box.net on Instructional computers UCB access to Box.net --------------------- Box.net is a service for online file sharing. UCB has an agreement with Box (http://technology.berkeley.edu/product

with Box (http://technology.berkeley.edu/productivity-suite/box/). People with UB CalNet IDs (/share/b/pub/calnet.help) can set up accounts by logging into https://berkeley.box.com/login, clicking on continue, and authenticating with one's

king on continue, and authenticating with one's Calnet ID & Passphrase. Each account has 25GB of storage (max 5GB per file) and can be accessed via web or desktop client software. For more information, please see https://www.box.net. Bo

information, please see https://www.box.net. Box.net on Instructional computers ---------------------------------- The Box Desktop Sync app could be installed on the Macs in 200 SD. We will install it on other EECS Instructional computers a

install it on other EECS Instructional computers as time permits. (To list our computers, see http://inst.eecs.berkeley.edu/connecting.html#labs). EECS Instructional Support 378/384/386 Cory, 333 Soda
